name: Dead Wrong
technique: contrarian
platforms: [x]
tags: [contrarian, skepticism, vindictive, lesson, relatable]
source_month: "2023-09"
---

## Why It Works

We all face skepticism or criticism when making changes, whether in business or our personal lives — this resonates with nearly anyone. It provides a clear lesson: "Do what works. Not what people say works." The phrase "They usually turn out to be dead wrong" gives it a strong, harsh tone that drives engagement.

## Template

Every time I change something in my [Area of Life or Business], people tell me how bad the decision is.
They usually turn out to be dead wrong.
Lesson: [Pithy/Short Takeaway Lesson]

## Example

Every time I change something in my daily work routine, people tell me how bad the decision is.
They usually turn out to be dead wrong.
Lesson: Work your own damn way. Not the "productivity guru" way.
